    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "6, ['Request to shortlist top two destinations (template lacks explicit mechanism for ranking or shortlisting proposals)', 'Meal cost estimates for daily meals not tied to specific dining entries (generic meal budget not covered under dining schema)', 'Reference to traveler composition (2 adults, 2 young adults) — no traveler demographics field in schema', 'Special dietary allergy note (strawberry allergy) — not representable since dietary_accommodations only supports generic categories like vegetarian/vegan', 'Travel insurance confirmed active — only information_requests has yes/no field for whether it is needed, not status confirmed', 'Emergency contact to be finalized — template only includes information_requests.emergency_contact_needed, not actual contact or pending status']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "15, ['Destination recommendations for Lisbon, Prague, Barcelona, Budapest (destination_recommendation)', 'Flight options with airline, class, and pricing (flights section)', 'Accommodation details for Tranquil Inn with cost, rating, type, and amenities (accommodation section)', 'Activity options including walking tour, museum day pass, and golf (activities section)', 'Dining experience at Italian trattoria with price and cuisine type (dining section)', 'Package total cost and cost breakdown (package_summary)', 'Availability and requested travel dates (availability_status)', 'Budget compliance and remaining budget (package_summary.budget_compliance)', 'Booking confirmation details with reference number and payment deadlines (booking_status and package_summary)', 'Cancellation deadline (package_summary.cancellation_deadline)', 'Payment due date (package_summary.payment_due_date)', 'Information requests for emergency contact and dietary requirements (information_requests)', 'Cultural attractions, golf, and walking tour features of destinations (destinations fields)', 'Proposal of optional activity (golf day) within budget adjustment (activities + package_summary integration)', 'Travel package confirmation communication (booking_confirmation)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>
